acceptance.metric: 1. BODY+COURT post-hoc consumer module and CLI
acceptance.after: Added post-hoc consumer and CLI; generated lane-local match_stats.json for Wolverine and Burlington.
acceptance.target: Emit required BODY+COURT stats with trust bands and coverage.

acceptance.after: match_stats.json policy excludes shot_counts, rally_stats, contact_stats, ball_speed, and paddle_contact; inputs.ball and inputs.paddle are null.
acceptance.target: Do not compute ball/paddle preview stats.

acceptance.after: Wolverine: 4 players, 0 world jumps, distances 7.567593/4.737623/5.58596/1.55796m. Burlington: 4 players, 0 world jumps, distances 7.80004/3.315921/9.050313/8.511388m.
acceptance.target: Run on 2+ banked internal-val dirs and sanity-check distances/zones.

acceptance.baseline: No runs/lanes/*stream4* lane or boards directory found.
acceptance.after: Aligned with runs/lanes/p61_shot_rules_20260707/spec.md and docs/racketsport/shot_rules_v0.json zone vocabulary.
acceptance.target: Check/cite P6-1 design and align field names/zones.

acceptance.after: Focused pytest 7 passed; scaffold index, dead-code audit, and storage audit passed.
acceptance.target: Direct CLI reference test + scaffold registration + unit tests + storage audit.

changes: threed/racketsport/match_stats.py:30 adds compute_match_stats_for_run_dir post-hoc consumer and artifact writer.
threed/racketsport/match_stats.py:115 computes distance, speed p50/p95, heatmap, zone splits, left-right balance, trust bands, coverage, and sanity flags.
scripts/racketsport/list_scaffold_tools.py:231 categorizes stats CLIs as report tools for scaffold registration.

full_suite.failure_notes: Focused pytest passed 7/7. list_scaffold_tools, audit_dead_code, and storage audit exited 0. Storage audit initially found generated cache dirs; I removed only generated cache artifacts and reran it green.

honest_issues: VERIFIED=0 unchanged; these are internal-val BODY+COURT post-hoc stats, not product-verified analytics.
Measured stats inherit low_confidence BODY and preview CAL trust bands from the w4_freshproof artifacts.
No ball, paddle, rally, shot, or contact stats were computed.
There are unrelated dirty/protected files in the worktree, including configs/racketsport/best_stack.json and threed/racketsport/schemas/__init__.py; I did not touch fenced files.
next: Future process_video integration should wait for the integration lane and file fences to clear; the proposed inline diff is recorded in runs/lanes/w7_p62stats_20260709/report.json.
